pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11, preventing the use of Java 17 language features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate javax.servlet-api to jakarta.servlet-api for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 ecosystems require Jakarta EE namespaces; using javax.servlet will result in ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime due to missing javax packages.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation-api to jakarta.annotation-api for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 ecosystems require Jakarta EE namespaces; using javax.annotation will result in ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime due to missing javax packages.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate Core from version 5 to 6 to align with Jakarta EE and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 5 uses javax.persistence and javax.sql, which are incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE requirements; upgrading to Hibernate 6 is necessary to avoid runtime classpath conflicts and missing API errors.
